nasb.text: And the Lord said to me, “Faithless Israel has proved herself more righteous than treacherous Judah.

esv.text: And the Lord said to me, “Faithless Israel has shown herself more righteous than treacherous Judah.

cnv.text: 耶和華對我說：“背道的以色列，比詭詐的猶大還顯得正義。

ccb.text: 耶和华对我说：“不忠贞的以色列比奸诈的犹大罪过还轻。
